verse_text: Now in the fourth watch of the night Jesus went to them, walking on the sea.

links.context: Moses accomplished what he did through prayer and as a servant of Christ, but Christ Himself walked on the Sea of Galilee by His own absolute power ([[MAT.14:25]]). Job [[JOB.9:8]] prophesied of Christ, "who walks on the sea as on firm ground" (JohnChr).
